uplink.description: process gauge-pressure frame (fPort 2, probe mode 1, range 3)
uplink._note: Synthetic PS-LB frame, probe mode 1 (pressure), range select 3 (x0.1 MPa). IDC=12.0 mA -> (12-4)*0.1=0.8 MPa=800 kPa -> pressure.gauge. Battery/IDC/VDC formulas cross-checked against the upstream decoder on a probe-mode-0, IDC<=4 frame; the pressure branch is hand-derived from Dragino's documented transfer table because the upstream references an undefined `decode.` object that throws for non-zero pressure. Satisfies process-pressure (atLeastOne pressure.gauge).
fPort 5 is firmware/band info, not a measurement.
